user.title: SolarEdge EV Charger — Sign In
user.description: Enter your SolarEdge monitoring portal credentials. The integration will log in automatically and discover your site.

data_description.username: The email you use to log in to monitoring.solaredge.com
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (minimum 10 s)

site.title: Select Your Site
site.description: Choose which SolarEdge site to monitor. If your site is not listed, enter the Site ID manually (visible in the monitoring URL: …/site/XXXXXXX/…).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the SolarEdge monitoring portal. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your email and password.
error.invalid_site: No EV Charger found at the selected site.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This SolarEdge EV Charger is already configured.

init.title: SolarEdge EV Charger Options
init.description: Update credentials or polling settings. Leave **Password** blank to keep the current password.

data.password: New password (leave blank to keep current)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the SolarEdge monitoring portal.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed with the new credentials.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
